_comment: Per-captain / per-benchmark sharded-eval config. Copy to keys.json and fill real env-var names; never commit real keys. api_key_env names the ENV VAR holding that captain's Anthropic key (the value lives in the environment, not here). budget_usd / budget_tokens cap CostTracker spend per shard. Prices in memeval.cost.PRICING are USD per MILLION tokens and are PLACEHOLDERS -- verify before real runs.
